title: PDF Viewer single scroll container (dbg80)
description:
PipeSync PDF Viewer now uses one outer scroll container with pages stacked in a vertical flex column (Okular/Edge-style), instead of nested scroll areas and overlapping absolute-positioned pages.

Scroll chrome no longer locks height to zoomport; native PDF iframes skip sharp oversample in viewer mode and use Fit/page-width instead of FitH.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg80). Who is affected: private OVH server users on PDF Viewer workspace.
changeLog: Single scroll container: flex column stack, no nested mini scrollbars.
Viewer pages use relative positioning instead of absolute left/top.
Native PDF iframes: no oversample transform in viewer; overflow hidden.
PDF hash view=Fit&zoom=page-width (no FitH internal scroll).
H14 scroll height / nested overflow diagnostics.
